case_title: KEEP AMERICA SAFE AND BEAUTIFUL VS. DUDA ENERGY, LLC ET AL

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Oct-05-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF KEEP AMERICA SAFE AND BEAUTIFUL's Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion to approve Proposition 65 settlement and consent judgment" is granted.

Order signed. Judgment signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
